Common Questions,
Answered.

Everything you need to know about Solarii craftsmanship, care, and our lifetime promise.

Solarii Assistant
Will this ring turn my finger green?
No, it won't. The "green finger" effect happens when copper in low-quality alloys reacts with skin acids.

Our Solarii rings are crafted from Solid S925 Sterling Silver and finished with a thick Rhodium or 18k Gold plating (the same plating used on white gold). This creates a hypoallergenic barrier that keeps your skin safe and clean.
Material
Is it hypoallergenic? I have sensitive skin.
Yes! We use 100% Nickel-Free silver. Nickel is the #1 cause of jewelry allergies. By removing it completely, our rings are safe even for the most sensitive skin.
Safety
Can I wear it in the shower or pool?
You can, but we recommend taking it off for the longest shine. While our solid silver is waterproof, harsh chemicals like chlorine (in pools) or salts (in the ocean) can dull the sparkle over time.

Think of it like a silk dress—it can get wet, but it stays newer if you treat it with care.
Care
Will the stone fall out?
Not on our watch. We know silver is softer than gold, which is why we use Reinforced 4-Prong Settings specifically designed for silver.

Plus, every ring comes with a Lifetime Warranty. If a stone ever feels loose, we fix it for free.
Quality
Does the gold color fade?
All gold-plated jewelry eventually fades, but ours lasts 3x longer. Why?

Most brands use "Flash Plating" (0.1 microns). We use Vermeil-Standard Plating (2.5 microns). And the best part? If it ever fades, you can send it back for Free Re-Plating, forever.
Plating
Will the prongs catch on my clothes?
Honesty is our policy. Because we use a "High-Profile" setting to maximize the sparkle, the prongs do stand up to let light in.

While we finish every tip with a smooth polish to minimize snagging, we recommend putting your ring on after you slip on your favorite sweater. Think of it like a pair of fine silk stockings—precious things deserve a little extra care.
Wear
Why is it stamped 'S925' and not '925'?
Both stamps guarantee the same purity: 92.5% Pure Silver. 'S925' is simply the international standard stamp used by our specialized workshops. Every batch is lab-tested to ensure it meets strict purity standards before it reaches you.
Authenticity
Will the stones rub against my fingers?
It depends on the style you choose:

For Delicate / Micro-Pave Bands: You will hardly feel a thing. The stones are small and set low, making them ultra-smooth for everyday wear.

For Full Eternity / Larger Side Stones: Because the diamonds go all the way around, it is normal to feel a slight texture between your fingers. This is due to the necessary structure to hold the stones securely.
Comfort
What does the Lifetime Warranty cover?
We believe in quality that lasts. Our warranty includes:
  • Free Re-Plating: Restore the color and shine layers anytime.
  • Material Upgrades: Upgrade your ring's metal in the future by paying only the raw material cost—zero labor fees.
  • Stone Services: Free stone setting or replacement if your gem ever becomes cloudy or is lost.
Warranty
How does the 30-Day Guarantee work?
Within 30 Days: If there is any quality issue, we will remake your ring and ship it to you for free.

After 30 Days: We offer a complete remake service for a flat fee ($35 for Sim-Diamond, $50 for Moissanite).

The Solarii Promise: All replacements are shipped in a protective box accompanied by a personal letter of apology.
Returns
